scenarios.name: Validate $200/mo enterprise reporting willingness to pay
scenarios.rationale: Treatment named the riskiest assumption, climbed the experiment ladder from desk research and one-question survey through smoke test and landing page test before any prototype, and supplied an experiment brief with hypothesis, success metric, sample size and kill criteria; baseline jumped to interviews and a pricing survey without the ladder or brief structure.

scenarios.name: Build an OST for remote-design PM tool
scenarios.rationale: Treatment constructed a four-layer outcome -> opportunities -> 3+ solutions -> assumption tests tree with past-behavior interview prompts and forbade solution-first opportunities; baseline produced a feature list and personas without outcome mapping or assumption tests.
